metadata.description: A marketplace of plugins for Claude Code, featuring tools for code management, creative writing, workplace productivity, and more.

plugins.name: powerball-core
plugins.description: Agentic tools for setup claude code, git workflows, issue resolution, code review, creative writing, doc searching, code example searching, and content translation — from smart commits and PR descriptions to fixing GitHub issues and translating markdown.

plugins.name: powerball-workplace
plugins.description: Workplace productivity skills for Claude Code — Jira ticket analysis, development planning, and task management integrations.
